name: customer_portal_url
label: Native customer portal URL (override)
help_text: Optional. When empty, uses theme Portal → Native Customer Portal URL (tickets).

name: knowledge_base_url
label: Native knowledge base URL (override)
help_text: Optional. When empty, uses theme Portal → Native Knowledge Base URL.

name: support_label
label: Customer portal link label (override)
help_text: Optional. When empty, uses theme Portal → Customer Portal sidebar label (e.g. Tickets).

name: knowledge_base_label
label: Knowledge base link label (override)
help_text: Optional. When empty, uses theme Portal → Knowledge Base sidebar label.

name: brand_title
label: Brand title (no logo)
help_text: Shown when no logo is set in theme Portal brand → Logo.
